demo.title: cattown.sh
demo.code:
# Check live world state (season, weather, time of day)
bankr prompt "What's the weather in Cat Town right now?"

# Read staking position and pending rewards
bankr prompt "How much KIBBLE do I have staked?"

# Stake 10 KIBBLE (integer, NOT wei — critical)
bankr prompt "Stake 10 KIBBLE in the Wealth & Whiskers Bank"

# Check today's boutique items with KIBBLE + USD prices
bankr prompt "What's in the boutique today?"

# Spin the gacha machine
bankr prompt "Spin the gacha once"

setup: Login: `bankr login email you@example.com` — generate a read-write API key
Fund your Bankr wallet with KIBBLE + ETH on Base for write operations
Try it: `bankr prompt "What's the weather in Cat Town right now?"`
